name: GPU Sanity Check
summary: Verify GPU allocation, runtime visibility, and basic framework access.
description: This skill provides a Slurm GPU smoke test for NVIDIA or AMD GPU nodes, including device visibility, scheduler allocation variables, and optional Python framework checks.

inputs.name: gpu_partition
inputs.description: Partition or queue that provides GPU nodes.

inputs.name: gpu_count
inputs.description: Number of GPUs to request for the test.

outputs.name: gpu_report
outputs.description: Device visibility and framework availability report.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Submit to a GPU test partition and confirm at least one GPU is visible inside the allocation.
